summary.en: The follow-up to Blue Ocean Strategy, focused on the human and step-by-step process for moving an existing team or organization from red-ocean competition to market creation.
summary.zh: 《蓝海战略》的后续实践书，重点不是解释概念，而是说明一个既有团队或组织如何通过步骤化流程，从红海竞争转向市场创造。

recommendation.en: Use this when Blue Ocean Strategy has produced a promising new curve but the team still needs a change process: aligning people, exploring noncustomers, choosing moves, and building confidence through evidence.
recommendation.zh: 当蓝海战略已经画出新价值曲线，但团队还需要推动转型流程时，推荐读这本：它关注人员对齐、非顾客洞察、战略选择和用证据建立信心。

sources.label: W. Chan Kim & Renée Mauborgne · Blue Ocean Shift · 2017
